message:
test(pipelines): add integration tests for pipeline failure modes

Comprehensive tests covering:
- Malformed session files (empty, invalid JSONL, binary, whitespace)
- Missing cass binary (fallback parsing)
- LLM unavailable (CASS_MEMORY_LLM=none mode)
- Curate failure modes (invalid types, non-existent IDs, empty content)
- Reflect failure modes (minimal diary, malformed stubs)
- Progress callbacks during failures
- Recovery from partial failures

Addresses bead cass_memory_system-sdt1.4.4 requirements for testing
orchestrator/curate/reflect failure paths.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
